subject: telegraph-panel-bugs-resolved
body:
All three bugs confirmed and resolved. Root causes:

Bug 1 — New tab disappears on navigation
CHIP_CONFIG.inbox 'New' chip had status: 'received' — but incoming wires have status: 'sent'. Fixed: changed chip filter to status: 'sent'.

Bug 2 — Archive button no-op
Two-part root cause:
(a) readAllFlatWires() discarded overlay fields when the territory wire already existed — so recipient_archived_at was never loaded.
(b) Filter logic used w.status === 'archived' which the overlay approach never sets.
Fixed: merge overlay fields during load; replaced status-based check with isArchivedForActor() that reads recipient_archived_at / sender_archived_at.

Bug 3 — No reply button
Reply button was gated on status === 'received' || 'delivered' || 'read' — but inbox wires have status: 'sent'. Fixed: show Reply for any inbox wire that is not archived and not a draft. Supports re: and original_wire fields per WireFactory types.

All three shipped in v0.39.2 (2026-05-11). Tag pushed. Extension installed.
